name: geocode_with_proximity
description: Forward geocode an address or place name biased toward a specific geographic point. Results closer to the proximity coordinates are ranked higher. Useful for location-aware search where the user's current location should influence result ranking.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The address or place name to geocode.

parameters.name: proximity
parameters.description: Bias point as 'latitude,longitude' to rank results closer to this location higher.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100). Default is 10.

parameters.name: countrycode
parameters.description: Comma-separated ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes to restrict results.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: IETF language tag for the response language.
